Other locations the gear can be found

Sigil Cube Artifact

Triggers: Duration of the battle

Frightening Power
The damage to all enemies in a small radius around the artifact owner is increased by 25%.

Once in a while, increases damage, crit, as well as physical and magic armor piercing by 50% for 4 sec to self and all allies. During this time, all enemies can't gain shields or damage-absorbing and damage-reducing effects.

Requirements: 90-100
